target: 7th Loop
2. Everyone Gathered?

Totsumura-san, you came.
Thank you.

But you're late.
What were you doing?
Ah~ it took a while to style my hair…

Eh?!
U-uh… Ushio…!
Wahhhhh!!!

That reaction…
I saw Sou do that earlier.

Out!~!
Ghost!~!

What a noisy guy…
You want me to fight with this guy?
Zizizii, G-cup!!??
Is that really something to be surprised about?
Here~! Kaori-san!!??

W-what's going on!?
Shinpei-kun,
what kind of gathering is this!?

Wasting time.
Ushio, quickly show him that.

Right.
Totsumura-san, come here.
O-oh…
Come on, extend your hand.

This is what's happened so far.
And…
What might happen next.
Alright, that's it.

Totsumura?
Ah… you're frozen.

It's fine to stay like that.
Quietly.

Shinpei, where's the other person?
You said you invited them.

That's the thing…
Sou, did Tokiko reply?
No… she hasn't come yet.
You did send a message, right?

I sent it before I ran away, and it was read.
But there's no reply.
I've called several times, but she doesn't answer.

I called too,
but she didn't answer…
Where could Tokiko be?

What did she do!?
Tokiko should be the one to show Ushio her memories!

…Eh, cheating!?
Tokiko ran away too!?

Hey, Totsumura-san,
don't say things like that!

I-It's not like I wanted this!
Fighting that monster is impossible!!
I want to go back too!
I don't mind if you leave--

See, this person's also
asking to be left out…

But officer, even if you leave,
you'll definitely die.
…W-what!?
There's nowhere left to run.

Everyone on the island dies on the festival night.
Even if you try to escape, it's pointless.
Shadows are already among the ferry staff.
M-mad that's true!?

If you're going to die anyway,
show some courage and fire a single bullet at the enemy.
D-don't say such hopeless things!

Well, Shinpei.
Still waiting for her?

You can't wait anymore.
We have to start the plan with this number of people.
That's impossible!?
S-so, what about Tokiko?

(As Nezu said, waiting any longer
will make us fall behind in the initial move)

(Through this mark on my arm,
Heine is probably gathering information…)

Sou, Mio…
If Tokiko arrives during the battle, it'll be dangerous.
I'll tell her not to come.

J-just a little longer!
Wait a little more, okay!?

If Tokiko is safe,
I can show Ushio her memories anytime.
But…

Three minutes left.
If she doesn't show up by then, we'll give up.
Yes…
In the end… she didn't come.
Ah, there's nothing we can do.
Everyone, reconfirm the plan and weapons we discussed earlier.
Shin-chan…
…It's okay, Mio.

(If Mio had come, she would have been a big help…
)
(It seems she couldn't make it…)
I'm moving to my position.
Koyumiba-san should also move to her designated spot now.
But…

There's someone with the same loop ability on the other side.
If they find out you're with us, I can't guarantee your safety.

I'm sorry for dragging you in.
I'm glad you're helping, but please don't let anyone see you.

Don't worry!
Just leave it to the heroes of justice!
I see. Be careful, Shinpei-kun…
If I had searched for Tokiko more carefully…

What's the point in regretting?
Focus on the present.

You're right, Hizuru.
Sou, let's do our best!
O-oh… okay…

By the way, just checking…
Is there anyone who wants to run away?
If there is, I can take them to a safe place!
No one.
Cold-hearted!?

Hey, Tetsu…
Can you really do it?

I can do it!
I was just testing!

You're not serious enough.
Are you taking this seriously?

Come on, Shinpei.
Now's the time to be strict!

No, it's fine.
I'm not good at that--
I'm sorry for being late!
Tokiko!
I just noticed your message from my brother…

It's okay.
She did come after all.
Then, Tokiko--
No, Shinpei!! She's a shadow!!
Eh--?
Tokiko…?
Goodbye, Shinpei-san.
Shinpei!! !!
Nooo!! !!
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_TOK_KAGE>Tokiko is a Shadow!?</color>] acquired.
